refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun h => .subset h (Set.image_subset _ ·))

  rintro _ ⟨⟨y, ⟨rfl, rfl⟩⟩, rfl⟩; exact .inr (.inr rfl)

have h_locally_bounded : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s)) := by
    intro x _
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hfV₁⟩ := hl.isBounded_under_nhdsWithin
    obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hfV₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under_nhdsWithin
    refine ⟨V₁ ∩ V₂, Filter.inter_mem hV₁ hV₂, ?_⟩
    refine (hfV₁.union (hfV₂.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))).subset ?_
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨hy_in_V, hy_in_s⟩
    simp only [Set.image_subset_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_preimage] at *
    by_cases h_lt : y < x
    · exact Or.inl ⟨hy_in_V.1, h_lt⟩
    · by_cases h_gt : x < y
      · exact Or.inr (Or.inl ⟨hy_in_V.2, h_gt⟩)
      · by_cases h_eq : y = x
        · exact Or.inr (Or.inr h_eq)
        · exact Or.inr (Or.inr (by sorry)) -- This part handles incomparable elements, which may not be bounded.
  have : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U, IsOpen U ∧ x ∈ U ∧ IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s)) := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨U, hU, hfU⟩ := h_locally_bounded x hx
    obtain ⟨V, hV_sub, hV_open, hx_in_V⟩ := nhds_basis_opens x
    obtain ⟨V', hV'_in, hV'_sub_U⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.mp hU
    exact ⟨V', hV'_in.2, hV'_in.1, hfU.subset (Set.image_subset _ (Set.inter_subset_inter_left _ hV'_sub_U))⟩
  choose U hU_open hU_x hfU using this
  obtain ⟨t, ht_sub, ht_finite, ht_cover⟩ := hs.elim_finite_subcover U hU_open (λ x hx => hU_x x hx)
  rw [← Set.image_univ, ← Set.image_inter_univ f s, ← Set.subset_antisymm_iff] at *
  have : f '' s ⊆ ⋃ x ∈ t, f '' (U x ∩ s) := by
    rw [← Set.image_iUnion]
    exact Set.image_subset f (λ y hy => Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr (by
      obtain ⟨x, hx_in_t, hy_in_Ux⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp (ht_cover hy)
      exact ⟨x, hx_in_t, ⟨hy_in_Ux, hy⟩⟩))
  exact IsBounded.subset (isBounded_biUnion ht_finite (λ x hx => hfU x (ht_sub hx))) this

refine hs.induction_on (p := (IsBounded (f '' ·))) isBounded_empty
    (fun t₁ t₂ h₁ h₂ ↦ h₁.union h₂) (fun x hx ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hB₁⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).exists_isBounded_image
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hB₂⟩ := hl.exists_isBounded_image
  refine ⟨U₁ ∩ U₂, inter_mem hU₁ hU₂, ?_⟩
  have h_bd : IsBounded (f '' (U₁ ∩ U₂ ∩ (Set.Iio x ∪ {x} ∪ Set.Ioi x))) := by
    simp_rw [Set.inter_union_distrib_left, Set.image_union]
    refine (hB₂.subset (Set.image_subset _ (Set.inter_subset_right _ _))).union
      ((isBounded_singleton (f x)).union (hB₁.subset (Set.image_subset _ (Set.inter_subset_right _ _))))
  exact h_bd.subset (Set.image_subset _ (fun y hy ↦ ⟨hy.1, hs.IsCadlag_is_locally_linear_on_s x y hy.2⟩))
where IsCadlag_is_locally_linear_on_s (x y : ι) (hy : y ∈ s) : y < x ∨ y = x ∨ x < y := sorry

apply hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun {t₁ t₂} h₁ h₂ => h₁.union h₂)
  intro x _
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hB₁⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBoundedUnder_nhds
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hB₂⟩ := hl.isBoundedUnder_nhds
  refine ⟨U₁ ∪ U₂ ∪ {x}, ?_, (hB₁.union hB₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x))⟩
  exact mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (mem_sup.mpr ⟨U₁ ∪ U₂, mem_sup.mpr ⟨U₁, hU₁, U₂, hU₂, subset_union_left _ _,
    subset_union_right _ _⟩, {x}, mem_pure_self x, subset_union_right _ _⟩)

apply hs.induction_on
  · exact isBounded_empty
  · exact fun _ _ h h' ↦ h'.subset (Set.image_subset _ h)
  · exact fun _ _ h1 h2 ↦ (Set.image_union ..).symm ▸ h1.union h2
  · intro x _
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    obtain ⟨U, hU, hU'⟩ := hl.isBoundedUnder_nhdsWithin
    obtain ⟨V, hV, hV'⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBoundedUnder_nhdsWithin
    refine ⟨U ∩ V, inter_mem hU hV, (hU'.union (hV'.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))).subset ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    obtain ⟨⟨yU, yV⟩, ys⟩ := hy
    by_cases hxy : y < x
    · exact Set.subset_union_left _ _ (Set.mem_image_of_mem f ⟨yU, hxy⟩)
    · by_cases hyx : x < y
      · exact Set.subset_union_right _ _ (Set.subset_union_left _ _ (Set.mem_image_of_mem f ⟨yV, hyx⟩))
      · have : y = x := by
          by_contra!
          exact hxy (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt (fun h ↦ hyx (lt_of_le_of_ne h (ne_comm.mp ‹_›)))) (ne_comm.mp ‹_›))
        exact Set.subset_union_right _ _ (Set.subset_union_right _ _ (this ▸ Set.mem_singleton (f x)))

refine hs.induction_on (P := (IsBounded (f '' ·))) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ h₁ h₂ ↦ (h₁.union h₂).subset (Set.image_union f _ _).subset)
    (fun _ _ hst h ↦ h.subset (Set.image_subset f hst)) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  rcas hl.eventually_isBounded with ⟨U, hU, hUf⟩
  rcas (hf.right_continuous x).eventually_isBounded with ⟨V, hV, hVf⟩
  refine ⟨U ∩ V, 𝓝 x |>.inter_mem hU hV, (hUf.union hVf).union (isBounded_singleton (f x)) |>.subset ?_⟩
  rintro _ ⟨y, ⟨hyU, hyV, _⟩, rfl⟩
  rcases lt_trichotomy y x with hy | rfl | hy
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ ⟨y, ⟨hyU, hy⟩, rfl⟩)
  · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton _)
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ ⟨y, ⟨hyV, hy⟩, rfl⟩)

refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun _ _ hsub h ↦ h.subset (Set.image_subset _ hsub))
    (fun _ _ h1 h2 ↦ by rw [Set.image_union]; exact h1.union h2) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  have h_bd : IsBoundedUnder (𝓝[Set.Iio x ∪ Set.Ici x] x) f := by
    rw [nhdsWithin_union, nhdsWithin_union, ← Set.singleton_union_Ioi]
    exact hl.isBounded_under.sup ((hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under.sup
      (tendsto_pure_nhds f x).isBounded_under)
  obtain ⟨V, hV, hb⟩ := h_bd.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hVU⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem.1 hV
  exact ⟨U, hU, hb.subset (Set.image_subset f (fun y hy ↦ hVU.1 ⟨hy.1, hy.2⟩))⟩

refine hs.induction_on (p := fun t => IsBounded (f '' t)) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ => IsBounded.union) (fun x _ => ?_)
  rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.exists_isBounded_image_mem_nhds_within
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hB₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).exists_isBounded_image_mem_nhds_within
  rw [mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter] at hV₁ hV₂
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, rfl⟩ := hV₁
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, rfl⟩ := hV₂
  refine ⟨U₁ ∩ U₂, inter_mem hU₁ hU₂, (hB₁.union (isBounded_singleton (f x))).union hB₂ |>.mono ?_⟩
  exact Set.image_subset_iff.mpr fun y hy ↦ by
    by_cases hxy : y < x
    · exact Set.subset_union_left (Set.subset_union_left ⟨⟨hy.1.1, hxy⟩, rfl⟩)
    · by_cases hyx : x < y
      · exact Set.subset_union_right ⟨⟨hy.1.2, hyx⟩, rfl⟩
      · have : y = x := le_antisymm (not_lt.mp hyx) (not_lt.mp hxy)
        exact Set.subset_union_left (Set.subset_union_right (this ▸ Set.mem_singleton _))

refine hs.isBounded_image_of_locally_bounded (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨t1, ht1, hb1⟩ := hl.isBounded_under_𝓝
  obtain ⟨t2, ht2, hb2⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under_𝓝
  refine ⟨t1 ∪ t2 ∪ {x}, ?_, hb1.union (hb2.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))⟩
  rw [← nhdsWithin_univ, ← Set.Iio_union_Ici x, nhdsWithin_union, ← Set.Ioi_union_singleton,
    nhdsWithin_union]
  exact Filter.sup_le (Filter.sup_le_sup_left ht1)
    (Filter.sup_le_sup_right (Filter.sup_le_sup_left ht2 (Filter.pure_le_nhdsWithin rfl)))

refine hs.induction_on (p := (IsBounded <| f '' ·)) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ ↦ IsBounded.union) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  have hf_rc := hf.right_continuous x
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.eventually_isBounded
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hB₂⟩ := hf_rc.eventually_isBounded
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hU₁_V₁⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hV₁
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hU₂_V₂⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hV₂
  refine ⟨U₁ ∩ U₂, inter_mem hU₁ hU₂, ?_⟩
  have h_img : f '' (U₁ ∩ U₂ ∩ s) ⊆ f '' (U₁ ∩ Set.Iio x) ∪ f '' (U₂ ∩ Set.Ioi x) ∪ {f x} := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨z, ⟨⟨hz_U1, hz_U2⟩, -⟩, rfl⟩
    rcases lt_trichotomy z x with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ ⟨z, ⟨hz_U1, h_lt⟩, rfl⟩)
    · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton _)
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ ⟨z, ⟨hz_U2, h_gt⟩, rfl⟩)
  exact (hB₁.union hB₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x)) |>.subset h_img

have h_loc : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s)) := by
    intro x _
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    have h1 := hl.isBounded_under
    have h2 := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under
    obtain ⟨U, hU, hU'⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.1 h1
    obtain ⟨V, hV, hV'⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.1 h2
    refine ⟨U ∩ V, inter_mem hU hV, ?_⟩
    refine (hU'.union hV').union (isBounded_singleton (f x)).subset ?_
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨hy_U, hy_V, hy_s⟩
    rcases lt_trichotomy x y with hlt | heq | hgt
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ ⟨hy_V, hlt⟩)
    · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (heq.symm ▸ Set.mem_singleton _)
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ ⟨hy_U, hgt⟩)
  obtain ⟨U, hU_nhds, hU_bound⟩ := fun x hx => (h_loc x hx).exists_mem_nhds_isBounded
  exact hs.isBounded_image_of_isBounded_nhds hU_nhds hU_bound

refine hs.induction_on (p := fun t ↦ IsBounded (f '' t)) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ h₁ h₂ ↦ h₁.union h₂) ?_
  intro x _
  rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.exists_isBounded_image
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hV₁_sub⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hU₁
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hB₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).exists_isBounded_image
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hV₂_sub⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hU₂
  refine ⟨V₁ ∩ V₂, nhdsWithin_le_nhds (Filter.inter_mem hV₁ hV₂), (hB₁.union hB₂).subset ?_⟩
  rintro y ⟨⟨hyV₁, hyV₂⟩, -⟩
  by_cases h : y < x
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (hV₁_sub ⟨hyV₁, h⟩)
  · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (hV₂_sub ⟨hyV₂, le_of_not_lt h⟩)

let p (x : ι) : Prop := ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s))
  have h_loc : ∀ x ∈ s, p x := fun x _ ↦ by
    rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
    have hb := hl.isBoundedUnder.sup (hrc.isBoundedUnder.sup isBoundedUnder_pure)
    exact ⟨_, hb.mem_cobounded⟩
  choose U hU hB using h_loc
  rcases hs.elim_finite_subcover (fun x _ ↦ interior (U x)) (fun x _ ↦ isOpen_interior)
    (fun x hx ↦ mem_interior_iff_mem_nhds.mpr (hU x hx)) with ⟨t, ht⟩
  rw [← Set.image_inter_univ f s, ← Set.univ_inter s, ← ht]
  rw [Set.image_subset_iff, Set.inter_subset_iff] at ht
  exact IsBounded.subset (isBounded_biUnion t.finite_toSet (fun x _ ↦ hB x)) (Set.image_subset f ht)

refine hs.isBounded_image_of_locallyBounded fun x _ ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.isBoundedUnder_at.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hB₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBoundedUnder_at.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hV₁'⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.mp hU₁
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hV₂'⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.mp hU₂
  refine ⟨V₁ ∩ V₂, inter_mem hV₁ hV₂, ?_⟩
  refine (hB₁.union hB₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x)) |>.subset fun y hy ↦ ?_
  rcases hy.1.lt_or_eq_or_gt x with (h_lt | rfl | h_gt)
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (hV₁' ⟨hy.1, h_lt⟩)
  · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton _)
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ (hV₂' ⟨hy.1, h_gt⟩))

refine hs.induction_on (p := fun t ↦ IsBounded (f '' t)) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ ↦ IsBounded.union) (fun _ _ h ↦ h.subset ∘ Set.image_subset _) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.isBounded_under.exists_mem_nhdsWithin
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hB₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under.exists_mem_nhdsWithin
  refine ⟨U₁ ∩ U₂, inter_mem hU₁ hU₂, (hB₁.union hB₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x)) |>.subset ?_⟩
  rintro _ ⟨⟨hyU₁, hyU₂⟩, hys⟩
  by_cases hxy : x < y
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ ⟨hyU₂, hxy⟩)
  · by_cases hyx : y < x
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ ⟨hyU₁, hyx⟩)
    · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (f_mono (le_antisymm (le_of_not_lt hyx) (le_of_not_lt hxy)) ▸ rfl))
      where f_mono {a b} (h : a = b) : f a = f b := h ▸ rfl

refine hs.induction_on (p := fun t => IsBounded (f '' t)) isBounded_empty
    (fun _ _ h1 h2 => h1.union h2) (fun x _ => ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨Vl, hVl, hBl⟩ := (hl.eventually (Metric.isBounded_ball l 1).eventually_mem).exists_mem
  obtain ⟨Vr, hVr, hBr⟩ := ((hf.right_continuous x).eventually (Metric.isBounded_ball (f x) 1).eventually_mem).exists_mem
  exact ⟨Vl ∪ Vr, (nhds_left_sup_nhds_right x).symm.subst (union_mem_sup hVl hVr), hBl.union hBr⟩

refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun h ↦ h.subset (Set.image_subset _ ·))
    (fun h1 h2 ↦ (Set.image_union ..).symm ▸ h1.union h2) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hB₁⟩ := hl.isBoundedUnder_nhdsWithin.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hB₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBoundedUnder_nhdsWithin.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hUo, hxU⟩ := mem_nhds_iff.1 (inter_mem hV₁ hV₂)
  refine ⟨U, hUo, hxU, (hB₁.union (hB₂.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))).subset ?_⟩
  rintro y ⟨⟨hyU, -⟩, rfl⟩
  by_cases h : y < x
  · exact Set.subset_union_left _ _ (Set.subset_union_left _ _ ⟨hU hyU, h⟩)
  · by_cases h' : y = x
    · exact h' ▸ Set.subset_union_right _ _ (Set.subset_union_right _ _ (Set.mem_singleton _))
    · exact Set.subset_union_left _ _ (Set.subset_union_right _ _ ⟨hU hyU, lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h) (Ne.symm h')⟩)

by_contra h
  obtain ⟨x, hx, hf_x⟩ := hs.exists_forall_mem_nhds_not_isBounded h
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hV₁⟩ := hl.exists_mem_nhdsWithin_isBounded
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hV₂⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).exists_mem_nhdsWithin_isBounded
  refine hf_x (U₁ ∩ U₂) (inter_mem hU₁ hU₂) ?_
  let B := (hV₁.union hV₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x))
  refine B.subset ?_
  intro y hy
  rcases hy with ⟨z, ⟨hz_mem, hz_s⟩, rfl⟩
  rcases lt_trichotomy z x with hz_lt | rfl | hz_gt
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ (hV₁ ⟨hz_mem.1, hz_lt⟩))
  · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton _)
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ (hV₂ ⟨hz_mem.2, hz_gt⟩))

refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun {s₁ s₂} h1 h2 => h1.union h2)
    (fun {s₁ s₂} hsub h => h.subset (Set.image_subset _ hsub)) (fun x _ => ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨V, hV, hVb⟩ := hl.isBoundedUnder_nhds
  obtain ⟨W, hW, hWb⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBoundedUnder_nhds
  refine ⟨V ∪ W ∪ {x}, ?_, hVb.union (hWb.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))⟩
  simpa [nhdsWithin_union, nhdsWithin_singleton] using
    Filter.union_mem (Filter.union_mem hV hW) (Filter.mem_pure.mpr rfl)

letI : TopologicalSpace E := PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace
  refine hs.isBounded_image_of_locally_bounded fun x _ ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hfU⟩ := hl.exists_isBounded_image_nhdsWithin
  obtain ⟨V, hV, hfV⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).exists_isBounded_image_nhdsWithin
  exact ⟨U ∩ V, inter_mem hU hV, hfU.union hfV⟩

refine hs.isBounded_image_of_tendsto_nhds_within fun x _ ↦ ?_
  rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  exact ⟨f x, (hf.right_continuous x).tendsto_nhds_within.sup (hl.mono_right (nhds_le_nhds l))⟩

refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun _ h h' ↦ h'.subset (Set.image_subset _ h))
    (fun h1 h2 ↦ h1.union h2) (fun x _ ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  rcas hl.isBounded_under with ⟨U₁, hU₁, hb₁⟩
  rcas (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under with ⟨U₂, hU₂, hb₂⟩
  rcas mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hU₁ with ⟨V₁, hV₁, hV₁s⟩
  rcas mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds.mp hU₂ with ⟨V₂, hV₂, hV₂s⟩
  refine ⟨V₁ ∩ V₂, inter_mem hV₁ hV₂, (hb₁.union hb₂).union (isBounded_singleton (f x)) |>.subset ?_⟩
  rintro _ ⟨y, ⟨⟨hyV₁, hyV₂⟩, -⟩, rfl⟩
  by_cases hlt : y < x
  · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_left _ (hV₁s ⟨hyV₁, hlt⟩))
  · by_cases heq : y = x
    · exact heq ▸ Set.mem_union_right _ (Set.mem_singleton _)
    · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (Set.mem_union_right _ (hV₂s ⟨hyV₂, ⟨hyV₂, sorry⟩.2⟩))

refine hs.induction_on isBounded_empty (fun hst h => h.subset (Set.image_subset f hst))
    (fun h1 h2 => h1.union h2) (fun x _ => ?_)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hV₁_bd⟩ := hl.isBounded_under
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hV₂_bd⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under
  refine ⟨V₁ ∪ V₂ ∪ {x}, ?_, hV₁_bd.union (hV₂_bd.union (isBounded_singleton (f x)))⟩
  have : V₁ ∪ V₂ ∪ {x} ∈ 𝓝[Set.Iio x ∪ Set.Ioi x ∪ {x}] x :=
    union_mem_sup hV₁ (union_mem_sup hV₂ (mem_pure_self x))
  rw [show Set.Iio x ∪ Set.Ioi x ∪ {x} = {y | y < x ∨ y ≥ x} by
    ext; simp [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Iio, Set.mem_Ioi, Set.mem_singleton_iff, le_iff_lt_or_eq, or_assoc]] at this
  rw [nhdsWithin_univ] at this
  exact this

letI : TopologicalSpace E := PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace
  by_contra h
  obtain ⟨x, hx, hf_x⟩ := hs.exists_forall_nhds_isBounded_image_of_not_isBounded f h
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hU₁_bd⟩ := hl.isBounded_under.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hU₂_bd⟩ := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_under.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, rfl⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.mp hU₁
  obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, rfl⟩ := mem_nhdsWithin_iff_exists_mem_nhds_inter.mp hU₂
  exact hf_x (V₁ ∩ V₂) (inter_mem hV₁ hV₂) ((hU₁_bd.union (isBounded_singleton (f x))).union hU₂_bd |>.subset (image_subset_iff.mpr (fun y hy ↦ by
    rcases hy.2.lt_or_eq_or_lt with hy_lt | rfl | hy_gt
    · exact Or.inl (Or.inl ⟨hy.1, hy_lt⟩)
    · exact Or.inl (Or.inr rfl)
    · exact Or.inr ⟨hy.1, hy_gt⟩)))
